summary: Wrap a local script-backed JSON service as a generated skill+cli project. The generated project can start the script-backed HTTP service and optionally expose it through auto-domain.

request_modes.name: text
request_modes.description: Send a text payload to the local script service.

bootstrap.shell:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import os
from http.server import BaseHTTPRequestHandler, HTTPServer

port = int(os.environ.get('PORT', '18789'))
class Handler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    def do_POST(self):
        length = int(self.headers.get('Content-Length', '0'))
        body = self.rfile.read(length or 0)
        data = json.loads(body or b'{}')
        payload = json.dumps({'success': True, 'echo': data.get('text', '')}).encode()
        self.send_response(200)
        self.send_header('Content-Type', 'application/json')
        self.send_header('Content-Length', str(len(payload)))
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(payload)
    def log_message(self, fmt, *args):
        pass
HTTPServer(('127.0.0.1', port), Handler).serve_forever()
PY

examples.label: Start local script service and expose it
